review_text: App crashes every time I try to open a new task. I'm on Android 13 with a Samsung Galaxy S23. This started after the 3.0.1 update. Tried reinstalling but same issue.
Can't login since the last update. It shows 'Authentication failed' even with correct credentials. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.2. Very frustrating!
Amazing app! Completely changed how I manage my daily tasks. The new calendar integration is smooth and the UI is beautiful. Keep up the great work!
Please add a dark mode option. I use this app at night and the bright white screen is really hard on my eyes. Would make it so much better!
Data sync not working at all. I lost 2 weeks of data after syncing across devices. This is a critical issue - my work depends on this app. Galaxy Tab S8, Android 13.
Would love to see recurring tasks feature. Right now I have to manually create the same task every week. Please add weekly/monthly recurrence options!
App is extremely slow on older devices. Takes 8-10 seconds to load. I'm on a Pixel 4a. Used to be fast before 2.x updates. Please optimize!
Love the new collaboration feature! My team uses it daily. Sharing tasks and assigning to teammates works flawlessly. Best productivity app out there!

The notification system is broken. I set reminders for 9am but they arrive at random times - sometimes hours late. iPhone 13, iOS 16.5. Makes reminders useless.
Missing functionality for bulk task editing. Can only edit one task at a time. Would love to select multiple tasks and change priority/date in one go.
App deleted all my projects after I updated to 3.0.1. Completely unacceptable. I had months of work in there. iPad Pro, iOS 17. Please fix immediately.
Perfect app for GTD methodology. The tagging system and filters are exactly what I needed. Worth every penny of the subscription.
Too expensive for what it offers. Competitors offer the same features for half the price. Will cancel subscription when it expires.
Please add offline mode. I travel a lot and often have no internet. The app becomes completely useless without connectivity. This is a basic feature!
Widget on home screen crashes the entire phone. Had to do a hard reset twice. iPhone 15, iOS 17.3. Happens every time I tap the widget.
Great app overall but customer support is terrible. Waited 2 weeks for a response to my issue. The app deserves better support.
Updated from 2.x and everything migrated perfectly. The new interface is so much cleaner. Subtasks feature is a game changer!
Would be great to have Google Calendar integration. Currently I have to manually copy tasks to my calendar. Native sync would save so much time.
Search function completely broken after update. Can't find any tasks by keyword. The search bar does nothing when I type. iPhone 12, iOS 16.
